task_description: Implement AI photo editor pipelines (Magic Eraser, Unblur, Cinematic, Best Take) with inference runtime abstraction and edit history for @quant/photos package. Privacy-first, local-first design with mock implementations for testing.

verification.summary: Typecheck passes, all 39 tests pass across 10 test files (20 new tests in 5 new test files). Lint passes. Total new LOC: 462 (under 500 limit). Implementation covers InferenceRuntime, MagicEraser, Unblur, Cinematic, BestTake, and EditHistory with mock backends for testing.
